title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Tata Steel

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Tata Steel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Tata Steel in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Steel:
Tata Steel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel!
